CONTENT.Club career: Guessand is a youth academy graduate of Nancy. He made his professional debut for the club on 28 August 2021, in a 4–1 league defeat against Auxerre. At the age of 16 years, 9 months and 22 days, he became the youngest player to ever feature in a professional match for Nancy.On 1 July 2022, Guessand joined Serie A club Udinese on a three-year deal. He made his first-team debut on 4 June 2023, starting in a 1–0 league loss against Juventus. In January 2024, he joined Eredivisie club Volendam on loan for the remainder of the season.
CONTENT.External links: Axel Guessand at the French Football Federation (in French)Axel Guessand at WorldFootball.net
CONTENT.International career: Guessand is a French youth international.

SUMMARY: Axel Thurel Sahuye Guessand (born 6 November 2004) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defender for Italian Serie A club Udinese.
